videoTitle: Why watchtowers stayed awake after midnight

scenes.narration: After midnight, the outer wall sounded louder than the city itself.
scenes.imagePrompt: moonlit Joseon watchtower above a silent city wall, cold blue haze, cinematic detail
scenes.videoPrompt: slow push toward a moonlit Joseon watchtower, drifting night fog, cinematic
scenes.subtitle: The wall sounded louder at midnight.

scenes.narration: Guards listened for footsteps, bells, and anything that moved against the dark.
scenes.imagePrompt: Korean night guard listening from a high wooden watchtower, lantern glow, tense atmosphere
scenes.videoPrompt: gentle pan across a lantern-lit watchtower with a guard scanning the darkness
scenes.subtitle: Guards listened for the dark to move.

scenes.narration: That silence was not empty. It was the sound of waiting for trouble first.
scenes.imagePrompt: silent fortress wall before dawn, tense stillness, faint lantern light, cinematic realism
scenes.videoPrompt: slow dolly along a silent fortress wall before dawn, subtle lantern flicker
scenes.subtitle: Silence meant waiting for trouble.
